languages.text: "Понимаю. Теперь многие речи и догмы Экклезиархии и Устава обретают для меня значение, которого я не понимала ранее. Теперь я донесу его до зарковцев".
"So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Handbook have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."
languages.original_text: "Понимаю. Теперь многие речи и догмы Экклезиархии и Устава обретают для меня значение, которого я не понимала ранее. Теперь я донесу его до зарковцев".

traits.locale_text: "I see. Now many of the words and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our regulations have taken on new meaning for me. I will bring it to the Zarkovians."
"So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Code have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."
"I see. Now many of the words and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our regulations have taken on new meaning for me. I will bring it to the Merovians."
"I see. Now many of the words and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our regulations have taken on new meaning for me. I will bring it to the Zarkovians."
"So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Code have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."

languages.text: 「なるほど。今や教会の言葉や教義、そして我々の規則は、新たな意味を持つようになった。それをメロヴィアンに伝える」
languages.original_text: "I see. Now many of the words and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our regulations have taken on new meaning for me. I will bring it to the Merovians."

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Ekleşiarşi'nin ve El Kitabı'nın birçok söylevi ve dogması, benim için yeni bir anlam kazandı. Bunu Zarkovlularla paylaşacağım."
languages.original_text: "So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Handbook have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Ekleşiarşi'nin ve El Kitabı'nın birçok söylevi ve dogması, benim için yeni bir anlam kazandı. Bunu Zarkovlularla paylaşacağım."

languages.text: “原来如此。国教的诸多布道与教义，以及我们的《手册》，如今于我都有了全新的意义。我会将这些感悟分享给扎尔科夫人。”
languages.original_text: "So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Handbook have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."

traits.locale_text: “原来如此。国教的诸多布道与教义，以及我们的《手册》，如今于我都有了全新的意义。我会将这些感悟分享给扎尔科夫人。”

languages.text: "Ich verstehe. Viele der Predigten und Dogmen der Ekklesiarchie und unser Handbuch haben nun eine neue Bedeutung für mich. Ich werde mit den Zarkovianern reden."
languages.original_text: "So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Handbook have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe. Viele der Predigten und Dogmen der Ekklesiarchie und unser Handbuch haben nun eine neue Bedeutung für mich. Ich werde mit den Zarkovianern reden."

languages.text: « Je vois cela. Voilà qui donne un tout nouveau sens à bon nombre de mots et dogmes de l'Ecclésiarchie et de notre Manuel. J'en parlerai aux Zarkoviens. »
languages.original_text: "So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Handbook have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois cela. Voilà qui donne un tout nouveau sens à bon nombre de mots et dogmes de l'Ecclésiarchie et de notre Manuel. J'en parlerai aux Zarkoviens. »

languages.text: «Ya veo. Muchos de los sermones y dogmas de la Eclesiarquía y nuestro manual han adquirido ahora otro significado para mí. Lo compartiré con los zarkovianos».
languages.original_text: "So I see. Many of the sermons and dogmas of the Ecclesiarchy and our Handbook have now taken on a new meaning for me. I will share it with the Zarkovians."

traits.locale_text: «Ya veo. Muchos de los sermones y dogmas de la Eclesiarquía y nuestro manual han adquirido ahora otro significado para mí. Lo compartiré con los zarkovianos».
